step_rationale: Lactate reflects tissue hypoxia and cardiomyocyte ischemic stress; downregulation may indicate metabolic recovery.
mechanism: L-lactic acid dysregulation reflects myocardial ischemia, hypoxia, and metabolic demand–supply mismatch in acute coronary syndrome.

references.title: Urinary metabonomic study of patients with acute coronary syndrome using UPLC-QTOF/MS.
references.journal: Journal of chromatography. B, Analytical technologies in the biomedical and life sciences
